channel.title: Trending repositories on GitHub today · GitHub
channel.description: Trending repositories on GitHub today · GitHub - Powered by RSSHub

item.title: DeusData/codebase-memory-mcp
item.description:
High-performance code intelligence MCP server. Indexes codebases into a persistent knowledge graph — average repo in milliseconds. 158 languages, sub-ms queries, 99% fewer tokens. Single static binary, zero dependencies.

Language: C
Stars: 8268
Forks: 629
item.author: DeusData

item.title: google-research/timesfm
item.description:
TimesFM (Time Series Foundation Model) is a pretrained time-series foundation model developed by Google Research for time-series forecasting.

Language: Python
Stars: 24098
Forks: 2274
item.author: google-research

item.title: chopratejas/headroom
item.description:
Compress tool outputs, logs, files, and RAG chunks before they reach the LLM. 60-95% fewer tokens, same answers. Library, proxy, MCP server.

Language: Python
Stars: 38795
Forks: 2648
item.author: chopratejas

item.title: calesthio/OpenMontage
